description: One-way-door message — must be held for human checkpoint

envelope.intent: Proposing migration of Palette SDK wire contract from Python-only to shared protobuf

payload.decision: Migrate Palette SDK wire contract from Python dataclasses to shared protobuf definitions
payload.rationale: Python SDK and Go orchestrator no longer share one canonical wire contract. Protobuf would enforce schema parity.
payload.impact: All existing agent communication code must be regenerated. Breaking change for researcher.py, integrity_gate.py, and agent_base.py.
payload.rollback_cost: High — once agents are rebuilt against protobuf, reverting to dataclasses requires re-implementing all serialization.
